prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of HON stock, assuming approximately 25% annual volatility (typical for large industrial stocks), the 20-day prediction uses a geometric Brownian motion model. The point estimate reflects a slight positive drift consistent with long-term market trends. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard deviation of approximately 1.6% for the 20-day period, with appropriate z-scores for each confidence level (50%: ±0.67σ, 80%: ±1.28σ, 90%: ±1.65σ).
